---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement to AuditForge.
title: "Feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What reporting or redaction workflow would this improve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Example

Use fake or sanitized data only.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler options or workarounds.

## Security and Privacy Check

- [ ] This feature processes user-provided assessment results only.
- [ ] This feature does not add unauthorized scanning, exploitation, or live target testing.
- [ ] Any examples use fake data only.
